title: System
description: Inspect McHarbor application, runtime, and dependency information.
unavailable: System information is unavailable right now.

metrics.imagesContainersVolumes: Images, containers, volumes, and build cache

overview.dependenciesDescription: Dependency counts for backend and frontend.

runtime.backendDescription: Server-side runtime reported by the McHarbor API.
runtime.clientDescription: Browser-side runtime for the current session.

dependencies.backendDescription: Go modules bundled into the backend build.
dependencies.frontendDescription: Runtime dependencies bundled into the web UI.

terminal.title: OS terminal
terminal.description: Open an interactive shell on the Docker host operating system.
terminal.warning: This session has host-level access. Run commands only when you understand the impact.

logs.title: OS logs
logs.description: Review bounded host operating system log snapshots.

notices.generic: The log source returned a non-fatal notice.
notices.permission_denied: A host log file exists but McHarbor does not have permission to read it. A fallback source was tried.
notices.journalctl_failed: journalctl could not read this source. File-based logs were tried first.
notices.no_supported_log_source: No readable file log or supported journal source was found for this host.

updates.title: OS updates
updates.description: Check and apply package updates for the Docker host operating system.
updates.confirmDescription: This runs the host package manager and can change installed operating system packages.
